chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing ʿumrah During the Months of Hajj

text: 2940 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ : سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَفْرَدَ اَلْحَجَّ هَلْ لَهُ أَنْ يَعْتَمِرَ بَعْدَ اَلْحَجِّ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ إِذَا أَمْكَنَ اَلْمُوسَى مِنْ رَأْسِهِ فَحَسَنٌ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2940 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated:
Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about a man who performed Hajj as Ifrad (Hajj without Umrah). Can he perform Umrah after completing Hajj?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, if the razor has touched his head (he has completed the rites of Hajj), then it is good."
